title: arduina schimperi
intro: Arduina schimperi, also known as Abyssinian wormseed, is a flowering plant species native to East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat intestinal parasites and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Arduina schimperi include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
